description: A resource geologist incorporates new drillhole assay data into the geological block model to refine the resource estimate.

nodes.task_description: Import and validate the new drillhole data, checking for errors in location, depth, and assay values.

expected_outcome.value: New drillhole data is successfully imported and validated in the geology software.

nodes.task_description: Run a geostatistical estimation (e.g., kriging) to interpolate grades from the drillholes into the block model.

expected_outcome.value: The block model grades are updated based on the new data.

nodes.task_description: Generate a new resource tonnage and grade report and compare it with the previous version.

expected_outcome.value: A report is generated showing an increase in indicated resources.
